Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

VS 15, 51 [Sale of house][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1'o 1'

[...]

(o 1') [...] Nidintu-Anu, son of [PN ...], on the west, next to the vacant field of Nidintu Anu [....]

o 2'2'

[...]

o 3'3'

[...]-⸢ti₃⸣ [...]

o 4'4'

[... mni]-din-tu₄-d⸢a⸣-nu DUMU ⸢ša₂⸣ [...]

o 5'5'

[... tu₁₅MAR].⸢TU⸣ DA ki-šub-ba-a ⸢ša₂⸣ mni-⸢din⸣-[tu₄-d60 ...]

o 6'6'

[...] ⸢DA⸣ meš-ḫat ša₂-ni-tu₄ ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ ⸢31⸣ [...]

(o 6') [...] alongside the second measurement of that house, 31 [cubits ...]

o 7'7'

[...] ⸢meš⸣-ḫat IGItu₄ ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ 26 KUŠ₃ ⸢u₃?⸣ x-⸢ta?⸣ SAG.KI KI.TA ⸢tu₁₅⸣[U₁₈].LU DA [x]

(o 7') [...] the previous(?) measurement of that house: 26 cubits and ..., the lower front side on the south, alongside the [... of] Anu-balassu-iqbi and alongside the vacant field of [Anu-ab-utir,] son of Anu-ah-ušabši, descendant of Ah'utu.

o 8'8'

[md60-DIN]-su-E u DA ki-šub-ba-a ša₂ m⸢d⸣[60-AD-GUR] ⸢DUMU ša₂ m⸣d60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂⸢ši⸣ [A] mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-[tu]

o 9'9'

[...] MU-MEŠ 41 KUŠ₃ US₂ ANu₂ tu₁₅MAR.⸢TU⸣ [...] meš-ḫat ⸢IGI⸣tu₄ ša₂ ⸢E₂ MU⸣-MEŠ [x]-⸢1⸣ KUŠ₃ US₂ KI⸢u₂⸣

(o 9') [...] that [...]: 41 cubits, the long upper side on the west [...] the previous(?) measurement of that house: 7 cubits and 4 "fingers" on the front upper side on the north, alongside the house of Nidintu-Anu, son of Labaši, descendant of Hunzû. [...] cubits and 4 "fingers" on the fron lower side [...]

o 10'10'

[... meš]-ḫat IGIti₃ ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ 7 KUŠ₃ u₃ ⸢4ta⸣ ŠU.SI ⸢SAG⸣.KI AN.⸢TA⸣ [tu₁₅SI].⸢SA₂⸣ DA E₂

o 11'11'

[mni-din-tu₄-da]-nu DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši A mḫun-zu-⸢u₂⸣ [x] KUŠ₃ u₃ 4ta ŠU.SI [SAG].⸢KI KI⸣.TA

o 12'12'

[... ki]-⸢šub-ba-a ša₂⸣ md60-AD-GUR DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂ši ⸢A⸣ [mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂]-tu

(o 12') [...] the vacant field of Anu-ab-utir, son of Anu-ah-ušabši, descendant of Ah'utu.

o 13'13'

[...] MU-MEŠ 31 5/6 KUŠ₃ US₂ ANu₂ tu₁₅SI.SA₂ DA E₂ m⸢ni⸣-din-tu₂-⸢d⸣[a-nu] A mḫun-zu-u

(o 13') [...] that [...] 31 5/6 cubits, the long upper side on the north, alongside the house of Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Hunzû

o 14'14'

[...] US₂ KIu₂ tu₁₅U₁₈.LU DA ki-šub-ba-a ša₂ md60-AD-GUR DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-⸢GAL₂⸣[ši A mŠEŠ-ʾu]-u₂-tu

(o 14') [...] long lower side on the south, alongside the vacant field of Anu-ab-utir, son of Anu-ah-ušabši, descendant of Ah'utu

o 15'15'

[...]-⸢ta⸣ ŠU.SI SAG.KI AN.TA tu₁₅MAR.TU DA meš-ḫat IGItu₄ ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ 29 5/6 KUŠ₃ SAG.KI KI.TA

(o 15') [...] "fingers" on the short upper side on the west, alongside the previous(?) measurement of that house. 29 5/6 cubits, the short lower side [on the east]

o 16'16'

[...] ⸢x x KUŠ₃?⸣ 4ta meš-ḫat ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ E₂ MU-MEŠ i-ṣi u ma-a-du ma-la ba-šu-u₂ gab-bi

(o 16') [...] x cubits, 4 <<fingers>> (is) the measurement of that house. That house, as little or much as there is, all of it .⸢...] (as) the complete price of that house to [PN] son of Anu-ah-ušabši, descendant of Ah'utu [...].

o 17'17'

[...] ŠAM₂ E₂-šu₂ MU-MEŠ TIL-MEŠ [a-na ...] DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂ši A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu

o 18'18'

[... ina ŠU-MIN mdna-na-a]-MU DUMU ša₂ mta-nit-tu₄-d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu [ma-ḫir] e-ṭir u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ⸢ana muḫ-ḫi⸣ E₂ MU-MEŠ

(o 18') [...] received from Nanaya-iddin, son of Tanittu-Anu, descendant of Ah'utu. He is paid.

(o 18') Should a claim against that house [arise ...], x-Anu, son of Anu-ah-ušabši, descendant of Ahʾutu, will guarantee and pay to Nanaya-iddin, [son of Tanittu-Anu, descendant of] Ahʾutu, the 12-fold penalty.

o 19'19'

[mana-GAL-ka]-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂⸢ši⸣ [A m]ŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu u₂-mar-raq-ma a-di 12-TA.AM₃ a-na mdna-na-a-MU

o 20'20'

[DUMU ša₂ mta-nit-tu₄-d60 A] ⸢m⸣ŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu ⸢x⸣ [x x?] E₂ MU-MEŠ ša₂ mdna-na-a-⸢MU⸣ [A ša₂ m]ta-nit-tu₄-d60

(o 20') That house belongs to Nanaya-iddin, son of Tanittu-Anu,] descendant of Ahʾutu in perpetuity. The dimensions of the streets that pertain to that house belong to Nanaya-iddin in perpetuity.

Reverse
r 1r 1

A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ šu-u₂ KUŠ₃?-MEŠ ša₂ SILA-e-tu₂ ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ ⸢ik-kaš-ši?-du?⸣ ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU a-na u₄-mu ⸢ṣa-a-tu₂⸣ [...]

2 uninscribed lines
(witnesses)
r 22

[lu₂]mu-kin₇

(r 2) Witnesses:

r 33

[md60]-⸢EN⸣-šu₂-nu mni-din-tu₄-d60 u md60-NUMUN-GIŠ ⸢DUMU ša₂⸣ mta-nit-tu₄-d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu md60-NUMUN-MU md60-NUMUN-GIŠ ⸢DUMU-MEŠ⸣ ša₂

(r 3) Anu-belšunu, Nidintu-Anu, u Anu-zer-lišir, sons of Tanittu-Anu, descendant of Ahʾutu.

(r 3) Anu-zer-iddin, Anu-zer-lišir, sons of Šamaš-ittannu, descendant of Ahʾutu.

r 44

[md]⸢UTU⸣-MUnu A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ m⸢d⸣[60-NUMUN?]-GIŠ A mḫun-zu-u₂ md60-DU-A DUMU ša₂ md60-⸢ŠEŠ⸣-MUnu A

(r 4) Nidintu-Anu, son of Anu-[zer?]-lišir, descendant of Hunzu. Anu-mukin-apli, son of Anu-ah-ittannu, descendant of Ekur-zakir. Anu-ikṣur, son of Kidin-Anu, descendant of Kurî. Anu-ikṣur, son of Anu-ah-ittannu, descendant of Ekur-zakir.

r 55

[m]E₂.KUR-za-kir md60-ik-ṣur DUMU ša₂ mki-din-d60 A mkur-⸢i md⸣60-ik-ṣur DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu A mE₂.KUR-za-kir

r 66

md60-DIN-su-E ⸢DUMU ša₂⸣ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu map-la-a DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR

(r 6) Anu-balassu-iqbi, son of Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Ahʾutu. Aplâ, son of Nanaya-iddin, descendant of Luštammar-Adad.

r 77

m⸢ba⸣-la-ṭu u m⸢d60-GI⸣ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mdUTU-SUR A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR mni-din-tu₄-d60 u md60-AD-URI₃ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂

(r 7) Balaṭu and Anu-ušallim, sons of Šamaš-eṭir, descendant of Luštammar-Adad. Nidintu-Anu and Anu-ab-uṣur, sons of Ša-Anu-iššu, descendant of Hunzu. Anu-ab-utir, son of Iddinaya, descendant of Ahʾutu. Anu-ab-uṣur, son of Anu-ahhe-iddin, descendant of Gimil-Anu.

r 88

mša₂-d60-iš-šu-u₂ A m⸢ḫun-zu⸣-u₂ md60-AD-GUR DUMU ša₂ mMUa A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu md60-AD-URI₃ DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU A mŠU-d60

r 99

mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-⸢GAL₂⸣ši A mE₂.KUR-za-kir md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu mina-qi₂-bit-d60 DUMU ša₂

(r 9) Kidin-Anu, son of Anu-ah-ušabši, descendant of Ekur-zakir. Anu-uballiṭ, son of Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Ahʾutu. Ina-qibit-Anu, son of Anu-uballiṭ, descendant of Ekur-zakir. Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-eriš, descendant of Ekur-zakir. Anu-balassu-iqbi, son of Anu-ah-iddin, descendant of Kurî.

r 1010

md60-DINiṭ A mE₂.[KUR-za]-⸢kir⸣ mBAša₂-a DUMU ša₂ mdINANA-MU-KAM₂ A mE₂.KUR-za-kir md60-DIN-su-E DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MU A mkur-i

r 1111

mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ m⸢d⸣[60]-AD-URI₃ A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR md60-EN-šu₂-nu DUMU ša₂ mNIG₂.BA-d60 A mŠU-d60

(r 11) Kidin-Anu, son of Anu-ab-uṣur, descendant of Luštammar-Adad. Anu-belšunu, son of Qišti-Anu, descendant of Gimil-Anu.

r 1212

[m]⸢d60⸣-AD-GUR DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂ši A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu md60-BAša₂-an-nu DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 A mkur-i

(r 12) Anu-ab-utir, son of Anu-ah-ušabši, descendant of Ahʾutu. Anu-iqišanni, son of Ina-qibit-Anu, descendant of Kurî.

1 uninscribed line
r 1313

[...] ša₂ fbe-lit DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ md60-ik-ṣur AMA ša₂ mana-GAL-ka-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂ši ša₂!-ṭa-ri MU-MEŠ ša₂-ṭi-⸢rat?⸣

(r 13) [...] of Belet, daughter of Anu-ikṣur, mother of Ana-rabutika-Anu, son of Anu-ah-ušabši, that document is written.

2 uninscribed lines
(colophon)
r 1414

[...]-⸢x DUMU ša₂⸣ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU A md30-TI-ER₂ UNUGki itiBARA₂ U₄ 15-KAM₂ MU [...]

(r 14) [...] son of Anu-ahhe-iddin, descendant of Sin-leqi-unninni. Uruk. Nisānu, 15th day, year x [... king(s)].

(sealings)
